message:
fix: query Dolt server instead of embedded mode for JSONL backup

The daemon's exportTableToJsonl was using `dolt sql` in embedded mode
(filesystem-only), which reads stale on-disk state that lags behind the
running server's committed data. This caused the JSONL backup to write
identical content each cycle, producing no git diff and no commits —
making gt health report the backup as stale for 58+ hours.

Now connects to the running Dolt server via --host/--port when available,
falling back to embedded mode only when no server config exists.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
